channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mike Cannon-Brookes tackles Atlassian’s turnaround and AI expansion as solo CEO
item.description: Mike Cannon-Brookes, co-founder and now solo CEO of Atlassian, faces one of the most pivotal moments of his career as he seeks to steer the Sydney-based software giant through a major rebound. Atlassi...

item.title: Satellite data shows widespread ashfall impact across Albay after Mayon eruption
item.description: Ayon sa Philippine Space Agency (PhilSA), umabot sa 8,544 hectares ng lupa sa Albay ang naapektuhan ng ashfall kasunod ng pagputok ng Mayon Volcano noong May 2, 2026. Katumbas ito ng halos kalahati ng...

item.title: TVK chief Vijay meets Governor to present majority support for forming Tamil Nadu government
item.description: On May 6, 2026, C. Joseph Vijay, president of the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), met Tamil Nadu Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar to stake claim for forming the next state government. The Governor...

item.title: Highlights from the Annual ‘Fantazery’ Art Festival in the Carpathians
item.description: At the end of October, the Dragobrat region hosted the annual art festival 'Fantazery,' a celebration of contemporary Ukrainian creativity in a stunning mountain setting. The festival brought together...

item.title: Davido Pauses Music Career to Support Osun Governorship Campaign
item.description: Afrobeats superstar Davido don make am clear say he wan step back from music for now to face politics for Osun State. During one political gathering for Imole House in Osogbo on May 5, 2026, the singe...

item.title: AI Introduces Mollifier Layers to Solve Complex Inverse Partial Differential Equations
item.description: Researchers at the University of Pennsylvania have developed a new AI technique that addresses one of the most challenging problems in mathematics: solving inverse partial differential equations (PDEs...

item.title: Wike defends enforcement of land regulations in Jabi Lake amid political tensions
item.description: Federal Capital Territory Minister, Nyesom Wike, yan for Abuja sey him go continue dey enforce land regulations for Jabi Lake, even as some residents and religious leaders dey oppose development plans...

item.title: Constitutional Court to rule on Parliamentary handling of Phala Phala matter
item.description: Tomorrow, the Constitutional Court is set to deliver its judgment in the high-profile Phala Phala case, which involves President Cyril Ramaphosa and allegations surrounding undeclared foreign currency...

item.title: Magnitude 5.9 Earthquake Recorded Near Caraga, Davao Oriental, No Damage Expected
item.description: On Wednesday night, a magnitude 5.9 earthquake struck near Caraga town in Davao Oriental, according to the Philippine Institute of Volcanology and Seismology (PHIVOLCS). The earthquake occurred at 11:...

item.title: Southern California braces for above-average temperatures on Mother’s Day
item.description: Southern California is expected to experience a significant warm-up this weekend, coinciding with Mother’s Day. Following a low-pressure system that brought scattered showers and cooler temperatures, ...

item.title: Rajnath Singh to Review National Security and Military Preparedness on Operation Sindoor Anniversary
item.description: On the first anniversary of Operation Sindoor, Defence Minister Rajnath Singh is set to conduct an extensive review of India's national security situation and military preparedness at a joint commande...

item.title: Schools Nationwide to Undergo Brigada Eskwela from June 1 to 5 Ahead of Class Opening
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) announced that the annual Brigada Eskwela, the school maintenance and preparation program, will take place from June 1 to 5, 2026, ahead of the opening of classes o...

item.title: Australian shares expected to open higher following Wall Street gains, with oil stabilising
item.description: Australian equities are expected to open higher, tracking strong momentum from Wall Street where major US indices have reached fresh record highs. The upbeat sentiment in US markets is likely to flow ...

item.title: IAUE Acting VC Highlights Four Years of Academic and Infrastructural Progress Ahead of 44th Convocation
item.description: The Acting Vice Chancellor of Ignatius Ajuru University of Education (IAUE), Port Harcourt, Prof. Okechuku Onuchuku, don reflect on the progress wey di university don make under him for di past four y...

item.title: TGJones to Close Up to 150 Stores Amid Challenging Trading Conditions
item.description: TGJones, the company formed from the acquisition of 480 WH Smith stores by Modella Capital last year, has announced plans to close up to 150 of its high street outlets. The business stated that these ...

item.title: David Attenborough at 100: Career milestones and global impact of a pioneering natural history broadcaster
item.description: Sir David Attenborough is set to celebrate his 100th birthday on May 8, marking a remarkable life and career that has shaped how audiences understand the natural world. Over more than seven decades, h...

item.title: Rivers State Government to Complete Residential Quarters for Commissioners by November 2026
item.description: Rivers State Governor, Sir Siminalayi Fubara, don yan say the state government dey build new residential flats for Commissioners and Special Advisers and e go ready by November 2026. The Governor insp...

item.title: Documenting the Impact of the Kakhovka Dam Explosion on Southern Ukraine
item.description: Photographer Yana Kononova undertook a journey to southern Ukraine to document the profound changes caused by the explosion of the Kakhovka Hydroelectric Power Station on June 6, 2023. Her work captur...

item.title: Ted Turner, CNN Founder and Media Pioneer, Dies at 87
item.description: Ted Turner, the visionary founder of CNN, passed away at age 87. Born in Cincinnati, Ohio, in 1938, Turner attended a military boarding school and briefly studied at Brown University before being expe...

item.title: Deputy President Mashatile Conducts Oversight Visit to Address Service Delivery in North West
item.description: Deputy President Paul Mashatile is scheduled to visit the Ditsobotla Local Municipality (DLM) in the North West on Thursday to assess progress in improving service delivery. The visit follows concerns...
